info.name: HRMS-BE — Full API Collection
info.description: BenoSupport HRMS Backend — All modules from Auth to Payroll. Import and set BASE_URL + TOKEN variables.

variable.description: Paste JWT token here after login

request.description: Creates tenant + tenant_admin user. Save token as ADMIN_TOKEN.
Expected: 400 "Account already exists with this email"

item.name: 02 — Auth
item.description: Login, logout, password reset, invite accept

item.name: 03 — Company Config (P-6)
item.description: One config per tenant — timezone, workWeek, fiscal year, salary day

request.description: Auth: ADMIN_TOKEN. Safe to call multiple times (upsert).
Returns null if not created yet
Auth: ADMIN_TOKEN. Only send fields you want to change.
Expected: 400 "workWeek must have at least 1 day"
Expected: 400 if dept has active employees

item.name: 06 — Roles
item.description: System roles seeded at startup. Save hr_manager _id as HR_ROLE_ID.

request.description: Save _id as EMP_ID. Check response.employeeId = EMP0001
For testing INTERN-scoped + Mumbai location policies
Creates User account + sends credentials email. Then login to get HR_TOKEN
EDGE: self as manager → 400 "Employee cannot be their own manager"
Expected: 400 "Exit date is required when terminating employee"
Expected: 400 "Employee already exists with this email"
Expected: 400 "Active employee cannot be deleted. Please terminate or deactivate first."
Must be INACTIVE or TERMINATED first

item.name: 08 — Users & Invite
item.description: Invite flow + role/dept change with progression history

request.description: Expected: 409 "An invite has already been sent to this email"

item.name: ⚠️ NOTE — GET /users/:id route does NOT exist in code

request.description: CODE BUG: user.route.js mein GET /:id route nahi hai. Sirf GET / (list) aur GET /:id/progression hai. Route add karo ya GET / use karo with filter.
Triggers progression log + clears policy cache
Triggers progression log + clears policy cache
Expected: 400 "You cannot update your own account from here"
Expected: 400 "You cannot delete your own account"

item.name: 09 — Leave Types
item.description: Master list of leave types. Save _id as LEAVE_TYPE_ID.

request.description: Expected: 400 "Leave type with code AL already exists"
Only works if LEAVE_TYPE_ID is a system type. Expected: 400 "System leave types cannot be modified"
Initialize a balance first, then delete. Expected: 409

item.name: 10 — Leave Policy (P-7)
item.description: Scoped leave config. Version increments on every edit.

request.description: Empty applicableFor = catch-all. Save _id as LEAVE_POLICY_ID
Only hr_manager role employees. Role wins over dept in resolution.
Replace second DEPT_ID with actual Design dept ID
Create a fresh draft with no leave types, then activate. Expected: 400
Expected: 400 "Cannot delete an active policy. Archive it first."
Expected: 400 "Cannot deactivate a draft policy — delete it instead"
Auth: ADMIN_TOKEN. Must not be active. 409 if balances exist.

item.name: 11 — Attendance Policy (P-7a)
item.description: Shift, lateMark, sandwichRule, overtime. workWeek NOT stored here.

request.description: hr_manager role → 10:00 shift. Role beats dept in resolution.
Zero grace, full salary deduction per late
Verify: response must NOT contain workWeek field
Other lateMark fields must still be in response (deep merge)
Expected: 400 "Time must be in HH:MM format"
Expected: 400 "halfDayMinHours must be less than minimumHours"
Expected: 409 "Attendance policy with name already exists"
Expected: 409 "A policy with same shift timings and scope already exists"

CODE BUG: attendancePolicy.routes.js mein activate/deactivate/archive routes ADD NAHI HAIN. Service + Controller functions exist but routes missing. Prakhar se fix karwao: add PATCH /:id/activate, /:id/deactivate, /:id/archive to attendancePolicy.routes.js

item.name: 12 — Payroll Policy (P-7b)
item.description: Salary cycle, LOP formula, deduction priority. Save _id as PAYROLL_POLICY_ID.

request.description: Expected: 400 "startDay must be less than endDay"
Expected: 409 "Payroll policy with name already exists"
Expected: 400 "Cannot delete an active policy. Deactivate or archive it first."

item.name: 13 — Payroll Run (P-7b)
item.description: Runs payroll engine. Resolves PayrollPolicy per employee.

request.description: Returns full payslip with grossSalary, deductions, netSalary
Returns { results[], errors[], summary }. One failure does not stop others.
Expected: 400 "month must be in YYYY-MM format"
Create employee with no salary first. Expected: 400 "Employee salary not configured"
Deactivate all employees first. Expected: 404 "No active employees found"
Deactivate all payroll policies. Expected: 422 "No payroll policy configured for this employee"
Auth: HR_TOKEN. Must do before employee can apply leave.
Expected: 400 "Cannot debit N days. Current remaining balance is X days."
Auth: EMP_TOKEN. URL: POST /leave/me/requests (applyLeave function — triggers LeavePolicy resolution). NOTE: POST /leave/ is a DIFFERENT endpoint that creates a leave TYPE (not request).
Deactivate all leave policies first. Expected: 422
Expected: 400 "Start date must be in the future"
Expected: 400 "End date cannot be before start date"
Apply after an APPROVED/PENDING request already exists for overlapping dates. Expected: 400
Use a leaveTypeId that has no balance record. Expected: 404 "Leave balance not found for this type"
Auth: EMP_TOKEN. Check response.shiftStart, response.isLate, response.graceMinutes
Auth: EMP_TOKEN. Check workingHours, overtimeHours in response.
Deactivate all attendance policies. Expected: 422 "No attendance policy configured for this employee"
Call after already punched in today. Expected: 409
Punch-out immediately after punch-in. Expected: 400 "Punch-in ke 5 minute baad hi punch-out kar sakte hain"
Expected: 400 "Check-out time, check-in se pehle nahi ho sakta"

item.name: 16 — Policy Resolution Engine (P-10)
item.description: Resolution priority: role > dept > location > empType > default

item.name: [RESOLUTION] Punch-in as hr_manager → Policy A (role wins)

request.description: Auth: HR_MANAGER_TOKEN. Check response.shiftStart = 10:00 (HR Flex Shift policy)

item.name: [RESOLUTION] Punch-in as Engineering emp → Policy B (dept)
[RESOLUTION] Punch-in as Sales emp → Policy C (default)

request.description: Auth: EMP_TOKEN. Internally resolves LeavePolicy. 422 if no policy.
Check response.payrollPolicyName — must match the policy that resolved for this employee

item.name: [CACHE INVALIDATION] Change role then punch-in immediately

request.description: Step 1: punch-in (cache populated). Step 2: change role via PUT /users/:id. Step 3: punch-in again. shiftStart must reflect new role policy.

item.name: [EDGE] No active policy for any type → 422

request.description: Deactivate ALL attendance policies first. Must return 422, never 200 with defaults.
